metaDescription: Software development, mobile app development, and IT outsourcing services in Malaysia. We also support offshore development for Japanese companies.

seo.title: Takumi International Sdn Bhd
seo.description: Takumi International imports the finest Japanese goods and crafts, bring the best of Japan to Malaysia. Trust us to elevate your business with our expertise and quality products. We also offer consultation businesses targeting the Muslim demographic.
